name: Waterloo Ice House Mexican Corn Soup
recipeIngredient: 6 to 8 ounces Monterey Jack Cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove and discard the stems from the serrano peppers and poblano pepper. Finely dice the serrano pepper. Remove the seeds from the poblano pepper before slicing it into 1/2-inch strips. Dice the onion.
2. Melt the margarine in a soup pot over medium heat. Saute the diced serrano pepper, onion, and spices until soft, about 5 minutes.
3. Reduce the heat to low. Add the chopped tomatoes and simmer for 3 minutes.
4. Set aside.
5. In a large soup pot, combine the half and half with the corn soup mix (pepper mixture). Mix well before adding the creamed corn.
6. Heat the mixture over low heat until combined, about 10 minutes.
7. Spoon the soup into bowls, leaving about 1/2 inch of space from the top. Sprinkle grated Monterey Jack cheese evenly over each bowl.
8. Place tortilla chips on top of the soup.
9. Serve immediately. Makes 1 quart.
